name: notification-tools
description: Queue, route, and dispatch local agent notifications to Feishu.

interface.longDescription: Notification Tools provides a local notification-center skill for agent workflows. Producers append structured notification events into a local JSONL queue; dispatchers route Feishu cards by topic, sign webhook requests, respect quiet hours, keep target-scoped delivered sidecars, and prevent duplicate sends with a runtime lock.
capabilities: Send one topic to multiple bots
interface.defaultPrompt: Queue, route, or inspect local notification-center events.
